mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.student_name AS studentName, s.department, s.major, s.admission_year AS admissionYear FROM student s WHERE s.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mentor_student ms WHERE ms.student_id = s.id AND ms.student_status = 1 AND ms.teacher_status = 1 ) ORDER BY s.student_no

SELECT t.id, t.teacher_no AS teacherNo, t.teacher_name AS teacherName, t.title, t.department, t.research_field AS researchField, t.quota, t.remaining_quota AS remainingQuota FROM teacher t WHERE t.is_mentor = 1 AND t.remaining_quota > 0 ORDER BY t.teacher_name
